heading: Repealed or Omitted
label: 17825 Repealed or Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to protection of scientific credibility, integrity, and communication within NASA, was repealed in part and omitted in part. Subsec. (c) was repealed and reenacted as , National and Commercial Space Programs, by , §§ 3, 6, , , 3444, which Act enacted Title 51. Subsec. (a), which provided sense of Congress regarding NASA’s posture toward scientific research, and subsec. (b), which directed Comptroller General to initiate study within 60 days after , complete it within 270 days, and report to Congress, were omitted from the Code following the enactment of Title 51.Pub.
